subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the seat of the Throne, and the glance of loving-kindness hath been directed towards it. Whatsoever was mentioned therein hath become known [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات بمقر عرش وارد و لحاظ عنایت بان متوجه آنچه در او مذکور مفهوم گشت قد
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @suffering and imprisonment, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
